summary: Russian forces are reporting increased use of "Molnias" and strike/reconnaissance drones on the front lines, noting that while their electronic warfare systems can detect these drones, they struggle to counter them due to unknown control frequencies. They also report a significant drop in BM-35 and BM-70 drone attacks on Sumy and other cities, attributing this to possible production issues, intensified use of electronic warfare and interceptor drones, and the shutdown of Starlink systems previously used for control. The "Rubicon" Center claims 114 targets destroyed on March 9, 2026, across multiple directions, and is actively recruiting drone operators and specialists with a 2.3 million ₽ signing bonus. Ukrainian forces report successful repulsion of enemy mechanized assaults on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with the help of Lasar’s Group NSU and adjacent units. A Russian soldier was hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree.
